retry_reason: dev_pm_opp_put is a release operation; if it fails (e.g., refcount already zero), retrying would lead to double-put and use-after-free. The operation is not retryable.
contract_summary: This function releases the references on all required opps in the opp's required_opps array by calling dev_pm_opp_put on each valid entry, then sets the pointer to NULL and frees the array. It is a cleanup/put wrapper used during opp freeing. After calling this function, the caller must not access the required_opps array or any of its elements. The function does not return a value and always succeeds if used correctly (i.e., the references are valid).
